overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of an underground industrial facility. The player moves through rooms with purple neon lighting, past Tyger Claw gang graffiti, through metal walkways with NPCs, and into dark warehouse spaces. The environment features concrete walls, metal grating floors, and industrial piping with shifting colored lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with filing cabinets and purple lighting

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around a storage room examining filing cabinets and cables on the floor

entered.detail: white metal filing cabinets stacked against the walls
thick black cables snaking across the concrete floor
magenta and purple neon lights illuminating the room
industrial metal door with yellow warning lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit storage room bathed in purple neon light. White filing cabinets line the walls and thick cables run across the concrete floor. The player explores the space, moving toward a metal door at the far end of the room.

events.description: opens metal door revealing Tyger Claw gang graffiti on the wall beyond
lighting shifts from purple to teal and green tones in the corridor

agents.ego_description: opening a door and proceeding through a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: colorful wall art with red text reading TYGER CLAW
large metal pipes running along the ceiling and walls
metal grate flooring beginning to appear in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player opens the metal door to reveal a corridor with prominent Tyger Claw gang graffiti illuminated by a spotlight. The lighting shifts from purple to greenish-teal as the player moves deeper into the industrial passage, where metal grating floors and exposed pipes become visible.

events.description: lighting shifts to warm amber industrial lights illuminating the walkway
slows down while approaching NPCs cleaning the walkway ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding along a metal walkway, passing maintenance workers who are cleaning and conversing

notable_agents.action: maintenance worker mopping the metal grating floor with cleaning equipment
person in purple jacket and white hat standing against the wall

entered.detail: yellow safety railings lining both sides of the walkway
large industrial equipment and generators along the walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters a long industrial walkway with metal grating floors and yellow safety railings. The lighting shifts to warm amber tones from overhead industrial lamps. Several NPCs are present - maintenance workers cleaning the floor and a person in a purple jacket standing near the wall. Large pipes run overhead along the ceiling.

events.description: ascends concrete stairs to upper level of the facility

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and entering an upper room where an NPC is smoking

notable_agents.action: person standing at a metal table smoking, with green hair and mask

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading to upper level
metal work table with items on it

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete staircase to an upper industrial level. The lighting becomes darker and more greenish. An NPC with green hair stands near a metal table smoking. The environment transitions from metal grating to solid concrete flooring with metal railings along the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark warehouse room and exit corridor

events.description: enters large dark warehouse room from smaller corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a large dark warehouse space and approaching a metal gate at the corridor end

entered.detail: large open warehouse space with dim overhead lighting
metal security gate at the end of the corridor
exit door with red neon light above the frame

segments.scene_description: The player enters a vast dark warehouse room with minimal lighting, passing metal tables and industrial equipment. The space feels cavernous and empty compared to previous areas. The player continues through a final corridor toward a metal security gate and an exit door marked with red neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an underground industrial facility that transforms from a neon-lit storage area into a vast, dark warehouse. It begins in a dimly lit room bathed in purple neon light and filled with filing cabinets, moving steadily toward a metal door. As the door opens, the scene shifts into a corridor marked by Tyger Claw graffiti where the lighting transitions from purple to a greenish-teal hue across metal grating floors and exposed pipes. The camera then progresses onto a long industrial walkway under warm amber lamps, passing maintenance workers and overhead piping before ascending a concrete staircase into a darker, greenish upper level where a smoking NPC stands. Finally, the environment opens into a cavernous, dimly lit warehouse filled with industrial equipment, moving through a final corridor toward a security gate and an exit door glowing with red neon.
